headline: Eudia Announces Collaboration with Microsoft to Scale Expert Digital Twins for the Enterprise
summary: Joint co-sell and technical integration across Microsoft 365 bring Eudia's Expert Digital Twins and suite of specialized agents to in-house legal departments and adjacent teams at the world's most ambitious companies PALO ALTO, CA / ACCESS Newswire ...
